name: Agralite Electric Cooperative
message: Alex Rubbish & Recycling provides residential and commercial garbage, recycling, yard waste, and roll-off container services in Alexandria, MN. The company also manages leftover ash/fines, leachate, and organics recycling for the Pope/Douglas Waste to Energy facility. We will upload 136gb of corporate data soon. Detailed personal employee information (name, dob, and other information), client information, NDA and tons of other files.
